title: Comprehensive Safety Manual for Manufacturing Facility
scenario: Develop a comprehensive safety manual for a large manufacturing facility, incorporating guidelines for worker safety, equipment maintenance, and emergency procedures. Generate a safety manual document in standard business report format. Ensure the output is under 500 words and includes clear section headings and concise bullet points.
constraints: Must include a detailed section on emergency evacuation procedures
Must use a formal business tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the output adheres to all specified formatting and content constraints.
Judge the professionalism and clarity of the policy language.
Check that the manual includes necessary procedures and guidelines for worker safety and equipment maintenance.
